---
image: img.jpg
title: Measuring emotional states and behavioral responses to innovative design
author: Damien Dupré, Michel Dubois, Anna Tcherkassof, and Pascal Pizelle
description: 8th International Conference on Design and Emotion
date: '2012-09-01'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

8th International Conference on Design and Emotion

:::
